mean_en: to provide something good to balance or reduce the bad effects of damage, loss, etc.; to pay somebody money because they have suffered some damage, loss, injury, etc.
sentence: This man is talking with his boss about compensating his occupational injuries.
sentence_trans: 这名男子正与雇主协商工伤赔偿事宜。
word_etyma: com全部 + pens花费 + ate动词后缀 → 花费的钱全部拿回来 → 赔偿
